blocks.code:
(define YOUR_GUESSES (list (list 1 2 3 4) (list 5 6 7 8) (list 1 3 5 7)))

(define frame-num (or (get (rb-state "frame_counter.json") "frame") 0))
(set-random-seed! frame-num)
(define SECRET (map (lambda (i) (random 10)) (range 0 4)))

(define (grade guess)
  (define exact (length (filter (lambda (i)
    (= (nth guess i) (nth SECRET i))) (range 0 4))))
  (define digit-match
    (length (filter (lambda (d) (member? d SECRET)) guess)))
  (define misplaced (- digit-match exact))
  (list "exact" exact "misplaced" misplaced))

(println (string-append "frame: " (number->string frame-num) " (secret seeded from this)"))
(for-each (lambda (g)
  (let ((r (grade g)))
    (println (string-append (string-join (map number->string g) "-")
                            " → " (number->string (nth r 1)) "✓ "
                            (number->string (nth r 3)) "⁓ "))))
  YOUR_GUESSES)

(define won? (> (length (filter (lambda (g) (= (nth (grade g) 1) 4)) YOUR_GUESSES)) 0))
(if won? 
  (println "\n🎉 CRACKED IT")
  (println (string-append "\nSECRET: " (string-join (map number->string SECRET) "-") 
                          " (visible in demo; try without peeking)")))
blocks.output:
frame: 512 (secret seeded from this)
1-2-3-4 → 0✓ 1⁓ 
5-6-7-8 → 0✓ 2⁓ 
1-3-5-7 → 0✓ 2⁓ 

SECRET: 0-7-2-5 (visible in demo; try without peeking)
